content: coturn is battle-tested open-source TURN/STUN server. Official Docker image at coturn/coturn on Docker Hub. Ports: 3478 TCP/UDP (STUN/TURN), 5349 TCP/UDP (TLS), 49152-65535 UDP (media relay range). Supports long-term credentials, REST API shared secrets, realm auth, TLS/DTLS, IPv6. instrumentisto/coturn is a well-maintained alternative Docker image. Config: --network=host recommended for NAT detection. min-port/max-port configurable.
